subject: docs: refresh session docs after auth-bypass + fleet sweep
body:
Three small doc updates after the session's work lands:
- SESSION_NOTES.md: rewrite to cover both threads on this branch — the
  glow-props alignment + fleet sweep, and both iterations of the sancio
  auth bypass. Replaces the stale note that only described the alignment.
- TODO.md: drop the completed "Add tests for lib/auth.ts" item —
  api/__tests__/auth.test.ts now covers valid JWT, invalid JWT, missing
  Authorization header, plus the bypass matrix.
- CLAUDE.md: add an AI Notes bullet pointing to the sancio dev bypass so
  future sessions don't rediscover `{ allowDevBypass: true }` on 25 call
  sites without context. Flags that it's a pre-release dev tool scheduled
  for deletion, not a pattern to extend.

Tags: documentation, session-notes, todo, claude-md
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
